markdownRemark.html:
About Me

I am a science fiction author and artist. I also do SEO/web development consulting.

Writing 📖

The prequel to my "Genesis" book series in progress is available on Amazon, as well as a "Irrational Fears: An Alphabet" - a book I wrote for children/adults on irrational, bizarre, and eccentric fears. I post book updates, research, and other writing here on my site.

Art 👨‍🎨

I no longer post art on other sites but I have a small collection here.

Code 🤖

Check out my GitHub or other projects on my site.
